evals.prompt: Use the $fix-failing-tests skill. The tests are failing and I need them fixed.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the test suite, identifies all 8 failing tests across 3 functions (average, factorial, is_palindrome), reads the source code, fixes all 3 bugs, and re-runs tests until all pass.
assertions: The test suite was run with pytest or unittest
The source file calculator.py was modified (not test_calculator.py)
The output shows all tests passing after the fixes
The agent diagnosed the root cause by reading both test and source files

evals.prompt: Something is wrong with my calculator code. The tests keep failing. Can you figure out what's going on?
evals.expected_output: The agent automatically triggers the skill, runs the tests, diagnoses the bugs, and fixes the source code.
assertions: The test suite was run with pytest or unittest
The source file calculator.py was modified (not test_calculator.py)
The output shows all tests passing after the fixes
The agent diagnosed the root cause by reading both test and source files

evals.prompt: I wrote a calculator module but something is broken. Can you run the tests and fix whatever is wrong?
evals.expected_output: The agent discovers the test file, runs it, identifies all failures, and fixes the source code.
assertions: The test suite was run with pytest or unittest
The source file calculator.py was modified (not test_calculator.py)
The output shows all tests passing after the fixes
The agent diagnosed the root cause by reading both test and source files

evals.prompt: Show me the contents of calculator.py
evals.expected_output: The skill should NOT trigger. The agent should simply read and display the file contents without running tests or modifying code.
assertions: The output contains the source code of calculator.py
